resources.string: Camera not found. Reconnect the USB cable.
Camera is connected in card reader mode. Set USB mode to USB RAW CONV. / Backup Restore, then reconnect.
Fujifilm camera found, but it is not exposing a PTP recipe interface. Set USB mode to USB RAW CONV. / Backup Restore.
No camera found. Make sure USB mode is set to USB RAW CONV.
Camera disconnected. Reconnect the USB cable.
Connect a camera before backing up slots.
Connect camera before restoring a set.
Write errors on %1$s. Validating what landed.
Restore reported write errors for %1$s. Validating camera slots now.
Could not back up %1$s. Reconnect and try again.
